body:
🟡 **Bonus column shows "+0" in green with no currency symbol when bonus is zero** When a payroll person has `bonus: 0`, the bonus cell renders `+0` in green (`text-green-600`) instead of displaying a neutral-colored value with a currency symbol.
Root Cause The conditional at line 108 `+{val > 0 ? "₺" : ""}` omits the currency symbol when `val` is `0`, producing `+0`. Additionally, the entire `` always has `text-green-600` class regardless of the value. For example, with `bonus: 0` (Selin Kaya, Burak Koç in mock data at `app/(dashboard)/admin/payroll/page.tsx:29` and `page.tsx:69`): - Renders: `+0` in green - Expected: `₺0` in a neutral/gray color (the old code at the deleted payroll-table.tsx:160-163 showed `₺0,00` in `text-[#617289]` gray when the value was zero) **Impact:** Zero bonus values appear visually misleading — showing a green "+0" suggests a positive bonus when there is none.
```suggestion return ( 0 ? "text-green-600" : "text-gray-500"}`}> {val > 0 ? `+₺${val.toLocaleString("tr-TR")}` : `₺${val.toLocaleString("tr-TR")}`} ); ``` --- *Was this helpful? React with 👍 or 👎 to provide feedback.*

🟡 **Deductions column shows "-0" in red with no currency symbol when deductions is zero** When a payroll person has `deductions: 0`, the deductions cell renders `-0` in red (`text-red-600`) instead of displaying a neutral-colored value with a currency symbol.
Root Cause The conditional at line 121 `-{val > 0 ? "₺" : ""}` omits the currency symbol when `val` is `0`, producing `-0`. Additionally, the entire `` always has `text-red-600` class regardless of the value. For example, with `deductions: 0` (Can Özkan and Burak Koç in mock data at `app/(dashboard)/admin/payroll/page.tsx:44` and `page.tsx:70`): - Renders: `-0` in red - Expected: `₺0` in a neutral/gray color (the old code at the deleted payroll-table.tsx:166-169 showed `₺0,00` in `text-[#617289]` gray when the value was zero) **Impact:** Zero deduction values appear visually misleading — showing a red "-0" suggests a deduction when there is none.
```suggestion return ( 0 ? "text-red-600" : "text-gray-500"}`}> {val > 0 ? `-₺${val.toLocaleString("tr-TR")}` : `₺${val.toLocaleString("tr-TR")}`} ); ``` --- *Was this helpful? React with 👍 or 👎 to provide feedback.*

🚩 **Page metadata export was removed in the rewrite** The old version of this page (visible in the LEFT diff at lines 5-7) exported `export const metadata = { title: "Maaş ve Personel Ödemeleri | AgenciFlow" }`. The new Server Component page has no metadata export, meaning the browser tab title will fall back to whatever the layout provides (or the default). This is a feature regression rather than a bug, but it may be intentional if a parent layout sets the title. --- *Was this helpful? React with 👍 or 👎 to provide feedback.*

🚩 **@supabase/ssr downgraded from ^0.8.0 to ^0.5.2** The `@supabase/ssr` package was downgraded from `^0.8.0` to `^0.5.2` in package.json. The PR description mentions "Re-synced dependencies and package-lock to fix Next.js build errors", so this may have been intentional to resolve a compatibility issue with Next.js 16. However, downgrading a dependency can introduce subtle behavioral differences or miss security patches. Worth confirming this was intentional and that the lock file is consistent. --- *Was this helpful? React with 👍 or 👎 to provide feedback.*
